targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT k.close, k.close_time
  FROM dashboard.futures_klines_${interval} AS k
  WHERE k.close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY k.close_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
), preferred_base AS (
  SELECT k.close, k.close_time
  FROM dashboard.futures_klines_${interval} AS k
  CROSS JOIN latest
  WHERE k.close_time <= latest.close_time - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    AND k.close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY k.close_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
), fallback_base AS (
  SELECT k.close, k.close_time
  FROM dashboard.futures_klines_${interval} AS k
  CROSS JOIN latest
  WHERE k.close_time >= latest.close_time - INTERVAL '24 hours'
    AND k.close IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY k.close_time ASC
  LIMIT 1
), base AS (
  SELECT * FROM preferred_base
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM fallback_base
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM preferred_base)
)
SELECT CASE WHEN base.close = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((latest.close - base.close) / base.close) * 100 END AS change_24h
FROM latest
LEFT JOIN base ON TRUE;

SELECT
  create_time AS time,
  sum_open_interest AS "Open Interest (BTC)",
  sum_open_interest_value AS "Open Interest (USD)"
FROM dashboard.futures_metrics_${metrics_interval}
WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)
ORDER BY create_time;

SELECT
  create_time AS time,
  count_toptrader_long_short_ratio AS "Top Trader - by Account Count",
  sum_toptrader_long_short_ratio AS "Top Trader - by Position Size",
  count_long_short_ratio AS "All Traders"
FROM dashboard.futures_metrics_${metrics_interval}
WHERE $__timeFilter(create_time)
ORDER BY create_time;
